flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Pinnacle Career Institute rose 25% between 2006 and 2009 ($12.1k → $15.1k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Pinnacle Career Institute fell 16% between 2006 and 2009 (63.5% → 53.1%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 6 pp at Pinnacle Career Institute vs the 2003–2007 baseline (55.9% vs 62.0%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Pinnacle Career Institute fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5% → 0.0%).
